description: A junior developer left a three-service web application at /home/ga/app-debug/ that fails to start. The stack uses Nginx (reverse proxy on port 8080), a Flask API backend, and a MySQL database. Fix the docker-compose.yml file in /home/ga/app-debug/ until all three services are running and the application responds at http://localhost:8080. Do not replace the application code — only the compose configuration needs fixing. Login: ga / password123
